docs.title: Home
docs.text:
Giedre Caroline Rocha Financial & Business Operations Analyst Contract Management | Data Analytics | Power BI | SAP

Financial and Business Operations professional with experience supporting multinational organizations across contract management, financial analysis, revenue operations, sales support, and process improvement.

View Resume Data Projects Contact Me

docs.title: Professional Profile
docs.text:
I am a Financial and Business Operations specialist dedicated to optimizing processes in global corporate environments. Over the past decade, my career has evolved from managing international supply chains and import customs documentation to controlling complex B2B contract flows and financial metrics at multinational leaders like IBM and Tetra Pak.

This cross-functional trajectory allows me to understand both the physical movements of supply chains and the financial operations that power them. By combining this operational experience with my postgraduate studies in Data Science, I focus on building automated data pipelines and dashboards that turn operational friction into standardized, highly efficient, and profitable business cycles.

docs.title: Career Vision
docs.text: To bridge the gap between finance, day-to-day operations, and advanced analytics by designing scalable data architectures that empower multinational teams with automated, real-time insights.

docs.title: Key Highlights
docs.text:
• Billing Pipeline Management: Successfully managed end-to-end Q2C validation and billing processes for LATAM enterprise B2B accounts at IBM and Tetra Pak, overseeing pipelines valued up to $2.8M USD individually.
  • Reporting Automation: Built automated data-extraction pipelines using Power BI, Power Query, and Python, resulting in a 40% reduction in weekly manual reporting hours.
  • Multilingual Global Operations: Coordinated business-critical workflows and backlog resolutions for Latin American markets, collaborating fluently in English, Spanish, and Portuguese.
  • Advanced Data Specialization: Completed a Postgraduate specialization in Data Science (2026) to bridge corporate operations with advanced business intelligence and predictive modeling.

docs.title: Project: Q2C Multi-Year Consolidation
docs.text: Focus: Corporate Finance & Revenue Operations (Quote-to-Cash) Stack: Power BI + Power Query (M Language) + Python Data Pipeline (`Relatórios/` folder)

docs.title: Business Challenge
docs.text: To identify operational bottlenecks, ticket volume trends, and SLA (Service Level Agreement) deviations for open requests and commercial approvals submitted to the regional Q2C (Quote-to-Cash) team. The goal is to replace manual, fragmented spreadsheet tracking with an automated data pipeline that consolidates ticketing files across different year subfolders, providing stakeholders with clear visibility on backlogs and pipeline delays.

docs.title: 1. Data Cleaning & Integration
docs.text:
• Pipeline Setup: Developed a custom Python script (consolidate.py) using pandas and glob to scan and recursively import Excel and CSV files from multiple year directories (Dados 2021/ through Dados 2024/).
  • Traceability: Added metadata columns (Source_Folder and Source_File) to the consolidated dataset, creating a robust, audit-ready data lineage trail.
  • Cleansing & Normalization: Handled missing values, formatted date columns (Date_Created, Date_Resolved), and converted varying data structures into a unified, flat dataset.
  • FX Rate Conversion: Connected the model to public exchange rate logs to dynamically convert local LATAM currencies (BRL, MXN) into standard USD (Value_USD) for consolidated financial analysis.

docs.title: 2. Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
docs.text:
• Volume Tracking: Analyzed the distribution of 649 requests totaling $41.07M USD across a 4-year span to identify seasonal peaks and regional workload distribution.
  • Segment Analysis: Grouped Q2C operations by market, identifying Mexico as the largest market representing 40.4% ($16.61M USD) of the total volume, followed by Brazil at 27.9% ($11.44M USD).
  • Queue Bottlenecks: Discovered that Quote Approvals and Contract Validations accounted for the highest queue latency and backlog build-ups.

docs.title: 3. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
docs.text:
• SLA Compliance Rate: Measured the percentage of requests completed within target thresholds (SLA_Target_Days). Quote Approvals had the lowest compliance at 12.4%.
  • Average Resolution Time: Calculated the mean days to close request types, showing Quote Approvals took an average of 5.4 days against a 2-day target.
  • Backlog Value at Risk: Quantified outstanding open requests, identifying a high-risk backlog in Mexico of 73 open requests valued at $4.79M USD (representing over 45% of the total regional backlog).
  • Analyst Workload Distribution: Evaluated the percentage of tickets processed by each analyst (e.g., Giedre's individual contribution rose from 20.1% in 2022 to 26.1% in 2024).

docs.title: 4. Business Recommendations
docs.text:
• Approval Workflow Refactoring: Since Quote Approvals fail to meet the 2-day SLA target (averaging 5.4 days), the business should automate initial credit checks or decentralize approvals for low-value transactions.
  • Targeted Backlog Clean-up: Reallocate resources immediately to the Mexican queue to clear the $4.79M USD backlog at risk.
  • Workload Rebalancing: Implement a dynamic queue dispatcher that balances ticket assignments based on complexity rather than sheer volume to prevent analyst burnout and SLA degradation.

docs.title: 5. Data Storytelling & Business Impact
docs.text:
• Contextualizing Performance: The analysis demonstrates how Giedre's individual SLA compliance change in 2024 (from 54.5% to 26.9%) was not a drop in performance, but rather the result of a strategic shift in complexity—her workload of high-difficulty Quote Approvals increased 5x (from 2 to 10) and Contract Validations increased 2x (from 7 to 15), meaning she was tasked with resolving the team's most critical bottlenecks.
  • Interactive Dashboards: Created a Power BI dashboard connecting this consolidated model to provide executive stakeholders with real-time, interactive insights into LATAM revenue pipelines and analyst workloads.

docs.title: Portfolio Insights: Q2C Team vs. Analyst Performance
Country & Revenue Distribution (2021-2024 Consolidated)
docs.text:
Across all years, the Q2C operations processed a total of 649 requests representing $41.07M USD in transaction value:

  • Mexico (Market Leader): Processed 252 tickets valued at $16.61M USD (representing 40.4% of the total processed regional value).
  • Brazil (Secondary Market): Processed 185 tickets valued at $11.44M USD (representing 27.9% of the total processed regional value).
  • Andean & Southern Cone: Processed 212 tickets valued at $13.02M USD (representing 31.7% of the total value), with Colombia leading at $5.02M USD (12.2%), followed by Chile at $4.85M USD (11.8%) and Argentina at $3.14M USD (7.7%).

docs.title: Analyst Performance Analysis (Giedre Rocha vs. The Team)
docs.text:
This section contextualizes Giedre's operational volume and SLA compliance against the wider team's trends in 2022 and 2024:

  • Workload Contribution (2022): Giedre processed 20.1% of the team's total ticket volume (29/144 tickets) managing $1.84M USD in transaction value.
  • Workload Contribution (2024): Giedre's relative workload rose to 26.1% of all team tickets (42/161 tickets) managing $2.86M USD in transaction value, showing a significant increase in her relative contribution.
  • SLA Compliance & Speed (2022): Giedre maintained a 54.5% SLA compliance rate (5.2 days average resolution time), primarily driven by Invoice Disputes (10 tickets, 7-day target).
  • SLA Compliance & Speed (2024): Giedre's SLA compliance rate adjusted to 26.9% (6.0 days average resolution time).
  • Workload Complexity Shift: The drop in Giedre's SLA compliance rate in 2024 directly reflects a 5x increase in Quote Approvals (from 2 to 10 tickets) and a 2x increase in Contract Validations (from 7 to 15 tickets) assigned to her.
  • Alignment with Team Bottlenecks: Giedre's 2024 metrics align with the team's overall bottleneck where Quote Approvals has the lowest SLA compliance rate (12.4%) due to tight 2-day targets, demonstrating that her operational metrics reflect her handling of the team's most time-sensitive approvals.

docs.title: Projetos de Dados & Analytics
docs.text: Nesta seção, você encontrará 3 casos de uso corporativos detalhados, que exemplificam a aplicação de metodologias de Ciência de Dados, Power BI e Excel Avançado para resolver problemas reais de negócios nas áreas de Finanças, Operações Comerciais e Logística Internacional.

docs.title: 📊 Projeto 1: Dashboard de Performance de Vendas & SLA de Clientes
docs.text:
1. Painel Comercial e SLA de Distribuição (Américas)

Domínio de Negócio: Operações de Vendas & Supply Chain (Inspirado na vivência na Tetra Pak)

Ferramenta Principal: Power BI (Power Query, DAX Avançado, Modelagem Star Schema)

docs.title: 🎯 Objetivo do Projeto
docs.text: Centralizar e estruturar o monitoramento de faturamento, cancelamentos, créditos operacionais e nível de serviço (SLA) de entregas de maquinários e suprimentos para clientes na região das Américas, permitindo identificar gargalos no processo comercial.

docs.title: 🛠️ Solução Técnica
docs.text:
1. Modelagem de Dados: Integração de bases dispersas extraídas do módulo SAP SD (Vendas e Distribuição) e planilhas de satisfação de clientes. Construção de um modelo dimensional estrela (Star Schema) contendo tabela fato de vendas e tabelas dimensões de clientes, calendário, produtos e status de logística.
  2. Cálculo de SLA (DAX): Desenvolvimento de métricas em DAX para calcular a taxa de entrega no prazo (On-Time In-Full - OTIF), avaliando dinamicamente a diferença de dias entre a data solicitada pelo cliente e a data real de entrega registrada no SAP: 
    Status_OTIF = 
IF(
    fSales[RealDeliveryDate] <= fSales[RequestedDeliveryDate] && fSales[DeliveryQty] = fSales[OrderQty],
    "OTIF",
    "Atrasado/Incompleto"
)
  3. Análise de Churn e Satisfação: Cruzamento de dados de reclamações técnicas com os índices de satisfação dos clientes (NPS) para identificar contas críticas com alto risco de cancelamento.

docs.title: 📈 Resultados de Impacto
docs.text:
• Visibilidade Executiva: Redução do tempo de identificação de atrasos de entrega de 5 dias para visualização em tempo real.
  • Decisão Baseada em Dados: Permitiu que a gerência comercial renegociasse contratos de frete logístico ao evidenciar que 15% dos atrasos de entrega ocorriam em uma transportadora específica.

docs.title: 💵 Projeto 2: Controladoria Operacional e Análise de Desvio (Variance Analysis)
docs.text:
2. Dashboard de Gestão Orçamentária e Ciclo Quote-to-Cash

Domínio de Negócio: Finanças Corporativas & Controladoria (Inspirado na vivência na IBM)

Ferramenta Principal: Power BI + Power Query + Integração SAP ERP

docs.title: 🎯 Objetivo do Projeto
docs.text: Criar uma visão única para a diretoria financeira monitorar o andamento de faturamento de contratos SaaS e licenciamentos na América Latina, comparando mensalmente o Orçado (Budget), Projeções (Forecast) e o Realizado (Actual).

docs.title: 🛠️ Solução Técnica
docs.text:
1. Câmbio Dinâmico: Conversão automática de faturamento local (MXN, BRL, CLP) para a moeda de reporte corporativo (USD) por meio de uma tabela de cotações diárias conectada automaticamente via API pública de câmbio.
  2. Variance Analysis: Criação de visualizações de semáforo (KPIs visuais em verde, amarelo e vermelho) que destacam áreas em que os custos operacionais ultrapassaram o orçamento previsto em mais de 5%.
  3. Automação ETL: Utilização de queries em Power Query (Linguagem M) para consolidar, limpar e padronizar múltiplos arquivos regionais de forecast gerados em Google Sheets e Excel, unificando a estrutura dos dados antes de carregá-los no modelo.

docs.title: 📈 Resultados de Impacto
docs.text:
• Eficiência de Tempo: Economia de 40% do tempo mensal da equipe de analistas financeiros com tarefas manuais de colagem e formatação de planilhas.
  • Acurácia Financeira: Eliminação de erros de digitação manual nos consolidados regionais e aumento de conformidade interna de auditorias.

docs.title: 📂 Projeto 3: Simulador Logístico e Cálculo de Impostos de Importação
docs.text:
3. Simulador Inteligente de Custos Aduaneiros e Logísticos

Domínio de Negócio: Comércio Exterior & Finanças de Custos (Inspirado na vivência em Importação)

Ferramenta Principal: Excel Avançado (VBA, Power Query, Macros de Cenários, Fórmulas Complexas)

docs.title: 🎯 Objetivo do Projeto
docs.text: Estruturar uma calculadora automatizada em Excel que simule a viabilidade financeira e o custo real final (Landed Cost) de mercadorias importadas no Brasil, considerando frete, taxas de armazenagem, demurrage e a complexa cascata de tributos brasileiros.

docs.title: 🛠️ Solução Técnica
docs.text:
1. Automação de Cenários em VBA: Criação de um formulário de entrada onde o analista insere dados da Proforma Invoice (valor FOB, peso, cubagem, NCM e porto de destino). Um código em VBA pesquisa dinamicamente as alíquotas de impostos (II, IPI, PIS, COFINS e ICMS) correspondentes à NCM do produto.
  2. Cálculo da Cascata Tributária: Implementação de fórmulas de alta precisão que calculam a base de ICMS "por dentro" (padrão tributário brasileiro) e rateio de custos de frete internacional e seguros por item.
  3. Análise de Sensibilidade: Gráfico interativo que demonstra o impacto da variação cambial do Dólar/Euro sobre o custo final unitário do produto importado, permitindo planejar momentos ótimos de fechamento de câmbio.
' Exemplo conceitual do VBA para cálculo de Landed Cost
Sub CalcularCustoImportacao()
    Dim valorFOB As Double, frete As Double, baseImposto As Double
    valorFOB = Range("B4").Value
    frete = Range("B5").Value

    ' Base de cálculo tributária (FOB + Frete + Seguro)
    baseImposto = valorFOB + frete + Range("B6").Value

    ' Aplicação das fórmulas de impostos em cascata
    Range("C10").Value = baseImposto * Range("D10").Value ' II
    Range("C11").Value = (baseImposto + Range("C10").Value) * Range("D11").Value ' IPI
    '...
End Sub

docs.title: 📈 Resultados de Impacto
docs.text:
• Agilidade nas Operações: O processo de cotação e precificação de importação, que antes demandava cerca de 2 horas por processo para pesquisa manual de tributos, passou a ser simulado em menos de 3 minutos.
  • Redução de Custos: Aumento da precisão na provisão de despesas de armazenagem portuária e demurrage, reduzindo custos extras de armazenagem por atraso documental em 12%.

docs.title: Profile Summary
docs.text: Results-driven Financial & Business Operations Analyst with a proven track record in multinational settings (including IBM and Tetra Pak) and a Postgraduate specialization in Data Science. Expert in optimizing end-to-end Quote-to-Cash (Q2C) cycles, managing contract compliance, and supporting FP&A routines, including budget forecasting, cost control, and variance analysis. Advanced specialist in leveraging Power BI (DAX, Power Query) and Advanced Excel (VBA, macros, Scenario Manager) to automate reporting pipelines and transform complex ERP (SAP SD/MM/FI, IBM Cognos) data into interactive, decision-supporting dashboards. Strong capability in driving process optimization, streamlining cross-functional workflows, and managing multilingual stakeholder relations in English, Spanish, and Portuguese.

docs.title: Experience Timeline
docs.text:
Apr 2022 – Feb 2026 Finance Operations Analyst IBM

Managed contract validation, order compliance, and financial processing for regional enterprise clients (Mexico & LATAM Markets).

  • Quote-to-Cash: Managed Q2C contract billing, purchase order verification, and SLA compliance.
  • FP&A Support: Assisted in budget tracking, forecasting, and monthly closure variance analyses.
  • Reporting Automation: Built interactive Power BI dashboards integrated with SAP, saving manual compilation time.
  • Escalations: Handled complex contract adjustments and cross-functional query resolutions.

SAP ERP Power BI Excel & Sheets FP&A

Aug 2021 – Apr 2022 Sales Operations Analyst Tetra Pak (Americas Region)

Administered order processing, billing entries, and customer service records on SAP.

  • Order Management: Handled complex orders, credit setups, and returns via SAP SD.
  • Coordination: Aligned with Project Management (PMO) and logistics to ensure timely shipment dispatches.
  • Sourcing: Maintained procurement tracking for non-standard suppliers, verifying budget compliance.
  • Issue Resolution: Conducted audits on inventory differences, improving problem resolution speed.

SAP SD Advanced Excel English & Spanish

Coordinated logistics schedules and customs documentation for international food imports.

  • Customs Audit: Validated Commercial Invoices, Packing Lists, and Import Licenses.
  • Financial Control: Verified freight, insurance, and storage costs to monitor budget deviations.

Excel Analytics Foreign Trade

Supported Unilever's logistics operations, focusing on custom clearance and SAP entries.

  • SAP MM: Created purchase and import records, checking transit milestones.
  • KPI Reporting: Maintained custom clearance efficiency dashboards to track cargo delays.

SAP MM Data Reporting

Feb 2019 – Oct 2019 Operational Specialist Grupo Mirassol (Full-time)

Operational support for road transport, distribution, and fleet management.

  • Logistics Operations Management: Managed cost control, vehicle routing, and scheduling; oversaw payments and financial transactions. Cabotage support with Aliança Navegação.
  • Customer Service: Delivered high-quality customer service, aligning with clients and internal teams to meet deadlines.
  • Process Optimization: Created productivity reports to monitor performance, identify inefficiencies, and reduce operational costs.

Logistics Operations Fleet Management Cost Control

Dec 2017 – Dec 2018 Operational Specialist Grupo Toniato (Full-time)

Logistics process control and contract management for chemical and hazardous goods transport.

  • Freight & Budget: Handled budgeting and freight simulations for prospecting new opportunities; monitored Supply Chain implementation.
  • Contract & Documentation: Managed current contracts for compliance and material purchasing logs; maintained audit-ready files for external reviews.
  • Process Standardization: Created, updated, and disseminated internal procedures and best practices.

Freight Simulation Contract Compliance Supply Chain

Purchasing coordination and supplier management for environmental emergency solutions.

  • Delivery Tracking: Supervised supplier delivery schedules and aligned purchasing timelines with project requirements.
  • Documentation: Maintained purchase records and documentation for auditing and transparency.

Contract Negotiation Procurement Operational Risk
